flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of the Holy Cross rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.5k → $64.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of the Holy Cross rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.5k → $64.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of the Holy Cross fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
